## Note conventions (from CONTRIBUTING.md)

- Kebab-case slugs.
- Wiki links in `[[slug]]` format.
- Every note has at least one inbound wiki link (orphan rule).
- New typed notes go under `company/` or `product/` — never directly into `drafts/` as a final home.
